package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_handler_uses_global_singletons: Handlers that reach for global DB, logger, cache, or config variables instead of injected dependencies.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule053NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule053NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule053NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario053Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule053NegativeService, input Rule053NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
